title: CrystalCores
description: A mod to help newbies learn crystal!
body:
A mod to help newbies learn crystal! its a kind of utility mod based around Crystal and Anchor PVP. Helps with totem-ing, Helps with crystal-ing, helps with anchor-ing, and more!   This mod has tritotem/totem gaze (One of the first autototems to actually OPEN YOUR INVENTORY, move your cursor towards a totem, then equips it. Speed and other factors can be modified in the config as well.)
Crystal Flick Assist (if you hit a player with a full knockback attack while you have obsidian and end crystals in your hotbar, a nearby available placeable block will be found and your aim will be slightly shifted towards that block to facilitate placement of a quick obsidian + end crystal.)
Anchor Flick Assist (If you charge a respawn anchor past minimum capacity, your viewpoint will be flicked downwards (to facilitate the placement of a block between you and the anchor so you take no damage), and back up again to destroy the anchor. Speed is configurable)
Crystal Breaker (If you're holding the right click button, you'll automatically destroy end crystals as soon as they are within your crosshair as fast as possible, UNLESS you are above the crystal or at feet level to it.)
DragR (When holding right click while holding some specific blocks (such as glowstone or obsidian), it will simulate a packet-accurate drag click (places blocks as fast as possible), pairing great with crystal flick assist and anchor flick assist.)
